nasb.text: Can wood be taken from it to make anything, or can men take a peg from it on which to hang any vessel?

esv.text: Is wood taken from it to make anything? Do people take a peg from it to hang any vessel on it?

cnv.text: 人可以從葡萄樹上取木料製造物件嗎？可以從葡萄樹上取木料做釘子掛器皿嗎？

ccb.text: 葡萄木有什么用呢？能用它制造挂钩挂东西吗？
